title: CapyCraft
description: A Forge Minecraft mod that adds the lovable animals' Capybaras to the game!
body:
![CapyCraft](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1011748108222341161/1165680616113721415/testlogo.png?ex=6547bbac&is=653546ac&hm=adb4c44b9aabb0a4e331f7eac5b302db4dac3b30c4eed6df713ad7d29015d104&=&width=1382&height=345)
Hi! This mod is heavily outdated and has a few bugs that wont be fixed. I recommend using another mod instead however continue if you want, there's nothing stopping you **CapyCraft** is a mod for 1.20.1 that adds the highly lovable animals - Capybaras to Minecraft, along with oranges to feed them! I hope you enjoy this mod :) Capybara info: Capybaras can be fed wheat seeds, apples, oranges, grass, and melon slices, use oranges to breed them, and anything else to tame them. There are plans to make them ridable Capybaras have 4 variants; Brown, Albino, Dark brown, and Red.
Capybara variants; ![Variants](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1011748108222341161/1165682604385775626/capyvariants.png?ex=6547bd86&is=65354886&hm=191c8df8e080e9e7ceba30fe49a8b6bdce0439138a02e4aa71dce80402602a6b&=&width=749&height=587)
